name: batch_go
description: Run Go build, test, vet, check-syntax, or fmt (gofmt -w) on multiple packages, combining actions with output filtering.

parameters.name: --build|--test|--vet|--test-compile|--check-syntax
parameters.description: Actions to perform (repeatable; combine --build --test --check-syntax --fmt to do all)

parameters.name: --run=PATTERN
parameters.description: Test function filter pattern (like go test -run e.g. TestFoo|TestBar)

parameters.name: --count=N
parameters.description: Test repetition count (use 1 to disable caching)

parameters.name: --grep=PATTERN
parameters.description: Filter output lines matching pattern (repeatable, AND logic)

examples.expected: Build, test, vet, and syntax check output for each package
Test failures for TestFoo, limited to 20 lines
Formats, checks syntax, and builds all packages under ./pkg/

cost_saving_rationale: Collapses multiple separate go build/test/vet/gofmt commands into a single step and avoids piped grep/head chains, saving 2+ round trips per action.
